title: cortusa pekinensis
intro: Cortusa pekinensis, also known as the Chinese golden saxifrage, is a plant species native to China, belonging to the saxifrage family. Traditionally, Cortusa pekinensis is used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and treating respiratory issues, as well as having anti-aging properties. Cortusa pekinensis is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations can be found in various forms, including dried roots, leaves, and flowers, which are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
